title: SECOND CHANCE COMPANIONS - 211info
text: SECOND CHANCE COMPANIONS SECOND CHANCE COMPANIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance in finding owners for pets who are currently or about to become homeless, such as if an individual is entering an extended care facility that does not allow animals. Maintains a list of adoptable pets and provides referrals to low-cost spay/neuter clinics. Volunteer opportunities are available. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (360) 687-4569 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message phone (360) 687-4569 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit the website for more information. View adoptable pets and download applications online. Individuals with internet access should submit forms online or by email; call only if internet access is unavailable. FEES: Adoption fee varies by pet DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Animal Adoption Veterinary Referral Services Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SECOND CHANCE COMPANIONS
